features: DAILY ALLERGY DEFENCE: Gentle enough for everyday use, morning and night. Helps manage symptoms during pollen-heavy months or while indoors with pets
ALOE VERA INFUSION: Infused with soothing aloe vera to calm irritated skin. Ideal for sensitive noses and daily use, especially during hayfever season
EASES DUST ALLERGIES: Forms a barrier to block dust particles and allergens. Perfect for cleaning days, attic trips or staying in older buildings
NON-DROWSY PROTECTION: Offers allergy relief without affecting energy or alertness. Great for use before school, work, or outdoor activities
TRAVEL SIZED CONVENIENCE: Handy 50g tub fits in pockets, bags or glove compartments. Take it to work, on holiday or to school for daily relief
description: Product Description Don’t let hay fever ruin your summer! Fight back with Nuage allergy relief products. The Nuage Barrier Balm is designed for both adults and children, to ease symptoms of hay fever and dust allergies. The balm is a physical barrier reducing pollen, allergens and dust from entering the nose. Nuage barrier balm is drug free. How to use it? Using a finger or cotton swab simply apply a small amount of the product around the rim of each nostril. Ingredients Mineral Oil, Paraffin Wax, Aloe Vera (Aloe Barbadensis) Extract Directions Simply use a cotton bud or finger to apply some of the balm around the rim of each nostril. Safety Warning Suitable for Kids Manufacturer Contact Information Swirl Consumer Products Ltd, Manchester, M4 6AF, UK.
